description.en: Attacks an enemy and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to remove <color=#28d9ed>1</color> <color=#28d9ed>buff(s)</color> from the target.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で対象の<color=#28d9ed>強化効果</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1個</color>解除する。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 확률로 대상의 <color=#28d9ed>강화 효과</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>1개</color> 해제합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率解除目标的<color=#28d9ed>1个</color><color=#28d9ed>强化效果</color>。

name.jp: スライディングアッパー

description.en: Attacks an enemy and activates a <color=#28d9ed>Dual Attack</color> from the ally with the highest Attack.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、攻撃力が最も高い味方単体に<color=#28d9ed>連携</color>を発生させる。
description.kr: 적을 공격하고 가장 공격력이 높은 아군을 호출하여 <color=#28d9ed>협공</color>을 사용하게 합니다.
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并呼叫攻击力最高的友军发动<color=#28d9ed>夹攻</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a 100% chance to remove buffs from all enemies.\nIncreases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>2 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、敵全体の強化効果を100%確率ですべて解除する。\n味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>2ターン</color>の間UPさせる。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하여 적 전체의 강화 효과를 100% 확률로 모두 제거합니다.\n아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>방어력</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>2턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,有100%的几率解除全体敌人的所有强化效果。\n使全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>2回合</color>。

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
Increases Resilience of all allies by 50.

Reduces <color=#28d9ed>K</color>'s damage taken by <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> while <color=#28d9ed>Eva</color> is alive.
Recovers <color=#28d9ed>K</color>'s <color=#28d9ed>Weakness Gauge</color> by <color=#28d9ed>8</color> at the start of <color=#28d9ed>Eva</color>'s turn.

Increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> and grants additional effects when Lisha or Snow is defeated.
<color=#28d9ed>Lisha</color>: Increases <color=#28d9ed>Critical Hit Chance</color> until inflicted with Break
<color=#28d9ed>Snow</color>: Increases <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> until inflicted with Break
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
味方全体の効果抵抗を50UPさせる。

戦場に<color=#28d9ed>【エヴァ】</color>がいる場合、<color=#28d9ed>【ケイ】</color>の受けるダメージが<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>DOWNする。
<color=#28d9ed>【エヴァ】</color>のターン開始時、<color=#28d9ed>【ケイ】</color>の<color=#28d9ed>WG</color>を<color=#28d9ed>8</color>回復する。

【リーシャ】や【スノー】が倒れた時、<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>UPし、追加効果を獲得する。
<color=#28d9ed>【リーシャ】</color>:ブレイクするまで<color=#28d9ed>会心率</color>がUPする。
<color=#28d9ed>【スノー】</color>:ブレイクするまで<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>がUPする。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
아군 전체의 효과 저항을 50 증가시킵니다.

<color=#28d9ed>에바</color>가 살아있는 동안 <color=#28d9ed>케이</color>가 받는 피해를 <color=#28d9ed>30%</color> 감소시킵니다. 
<color=#28d9ed>에바</color>가 턴 시작 시 <color=#28d9ed>케이</color>의 <color=#28d9ed>WG</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>8</color> 회복시킵니다.

리샤나 스노우 사망 시 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color> <color=#28d9ed>100%</color> 증가 및 추가 효과 획득
<color=#28d9ed>리샤</color> : 브레이크 되기 전까지 <color=#28d9ed>치명 확률</color> 증가
<color=#28d9ed>스노우</color> : 브레이크 전까지 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color> 증가
description.zh:
(被动效果)
使全体友军的效果抵抗提升50。

在<color=#28d9ed>艾娃</color>存活期间,使<color=#28d9ed>凯伊</color>所受伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>30%</color>。
<color=#28d9ed>艾娃</color>在回合开始时,使<color=#28d9ed>凯伊</color>的<color=#28d9ed>WG</color>恢复<color=#28d9ed>8</color>。

莉莎或雪诺死亡时,<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>100%</color>,并获得额外效果。
<color=#28d9ed>莉莎</color>:使<color=#28d9ed>暴击率</color>提升,持续至进入力竭状态
为止。
<color=#28d9ed>雪诺</color>:使<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续至进入力竭状态为止。

description.en:
(Passive Effect)
Increases Attack by <color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color> and recovers Health of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> every time the caster takes a turn.

While an ally remains alive, reduces Weakness Gauge damage taken by <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> and increases damage dealt by all allies by <color=#28d9ed>40%</color>.
When using <color=#28d9ed>Shield Rush</color>, increases Priority of all allies by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.jp:
(パッシブ効果)
自分のターンが来るたびに、攻撃力が<color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color>UPし、自分のHPを<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>回復させる。

戦場に味方がいる場合、受けるWGダメージが<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>DOWNし、味方全体のダメージが<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>UPする。
<color=#28d9ed>シールドラッシュ</color>使用時、味方全体の行動ゲージが<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。
description.kr:
(패시브 효과)
자신의 턴마다 공격력이 <color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color> 증가하고 자신의 체력을 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 만큼 회복합니다.

아군 생존 시 받는 WG 피해가 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 감소하고 아군 전체의 피해량이 <color=#28d9ed>40%</color> 증가합니다.
<color=#28d9ed>실드 러시</color> 사용 시 아군 전체의 행동 게이지가 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>증가합니다.
description.zh:
(被动效果)
每到自身回合时,使攻击力提升<color=#28d9ed>7.5%</color>,并使自身的生命值恢复<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

友军存活时使所受WG伤害降低<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>,并使全体友军造成的伤害量提升<color=#28d9ed>40%</color>。
使用<color=#28d9ed>护盾突击</color>时,使全体友军的行动值提升
<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en: Becomes <color=#28d9ed>Enraged</color> when Health drops to <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> of Max Health or lower and attacks all enemies.\nAfter attacking, recovers the caster's Weakness Gauge by 30% and <color=#28d9ed>resurrects</color> all slain allies.
description.jp: 最大HPの<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>以下になると、<color=#28d9ed>【狂暴化】</color>状態に切り替わり、対象全体にダメージを与える。\n攻撃後、自分のWGを30%回復し、倒れた味方がいる場合、全員<color=#28d9ed>復活</color>させる。
description.kr: 최대 체력의 <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> 이하가 되면 <color=#28d9ed>광폭화</color> 상태로 전환하고, 전체 대상을 공격합니다.\n공격 후 자신의 WG 30%를 회복하며 사망한 아군이 있다면 모두 <color=#28d9ed>부활</color> 시킵니다.
description.zh: 若生命值降至上限的<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>以下,则转换为<color=#28d9ed>狂暴化</color>状态,并攻击全体目标。\n攻击后,使自身的WG恢复30%。若有死亡的友军,则使其全部<color=#28d9ed>复活</color>。
